address: 19 St Marks Pl, New York, NY 10003, USA

sources_checked.limitation: Full a la carte and catering menu with prices and short descriptions; no explicit allergen labeling beyond 'spicy'/'vegan' icons; no cross-contact disclosure present.
Homepage only; links to location pages, no menu content itself. Confirmed East Village location exists at 19 St Marks Pl and directed to the location page used as the actual source.

notes: Official restaurant website (che-li.com) location page for the East Village outpost at 19 St Marks Pl, New York, NY 10003 returned a complete, current, full-text menu on first fetch (no Chrome escalation needed). Both a catering (Half Tray/Full Tray) menu and the regular a la carte dining menu were present on the same page; catering items are largely bulk-portion duplicates of a la carte dishes and catering-only entries were not separately normalized as distinct dish records to avoid redundant near-duplicate entries (their allergen profile mirrors the corresponding a la carte dish where one exists). Beverage lists (sake, shochu, beer, wine, soft drinks, etc.) were consolidated into one record per category per project normalization rules rather than per individual flavor/label.
